reviews.comment:
Para mí muy buena atención a pesar de todo el público existentE que es difícil atender a todos juntos pero se atendían bien la comida perfecta si demoraban era por todos los colectivos llevaba n  a todos los pasajeros juntos

(Translated by Google)
For me, the service was very good despite the large number of customers; it's difficult to serve everyone at once, but they were well taken care of, the food was perfect. If there were any delays, it was because all the buses were taking all the passengers together.

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para parar a descansar, te atienden bien, aunque en el Bufet son un poco lentos. Pero tienen variedad y precios buenos. Los baños limpios y bien mantenido.  Saludos

(Translated by Google)
Good place to stop and rest, the service is good, although the buffet is a bit slow. But they have a good variety and good prices. The bathrooms are clean and well-maintained. Cheers!
